name: 1944 Green Tomato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a pie pan with pie dough.
2. Mix the sugar, flour, lemon rind, allspice, and salt together in a small bowl.
3. Sprinkle just a little of this mixture at the bottom of the pie shell.
4. Arrange tomato slices, one layer at a time, as you cover each layer with the sugar mixture, lemon juice, and a dot of butter on each slice.
5. Continue layering until you reach the top of the pie tin.
6. Cover with a lattice top crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
